51125.title: America
51125.extract:
Wikinews has three regions within the American supercontinent:

Central America
North America
South America
Avoid using the term America for the United States when writing in Wikinews's voice, as that usage subtly induces a US-centric perspective; using the more specific name for the country in Wikinews's voice quietly encourages a more international perspective.
